course_description.overview: Self-supported bikepacking race circumnavigating the Netherlands, primarily on paved paths with coastal headwinds, rivers, national parks, and southern hills including Keutenberg (16% gradient). Start/finish at De Proloog Cafe in Amerongen.

key_segments.name: Rivers Neder-Rijn and Waal
key_segments.description: Through historic cities Nijmegen and Arnhem.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Relentless coastal headwinds, flat distance with mental challenge of self-support and long paved miles; some short steep hills in south.

logistics.getting_there: Fly to Amsterdam Schiphol (AMS), train to Amerongen; start/finish at De Proloog Cafe, Allemanswaard 27, 3958 KA Amerongen.
logistics.accommodation: Fully self-supported; optional hostel add-on night before race (May 1); no finish sleep provided.
logistics.registration_details: Opens Aug 1, 2025, closes Mar 1, 2026. Early fee: €235 solo/€215 team; late: €275/€255. No refunds after Dec 30, 2025.
logistics.bike_logistics: Fly with bike or rent; e-bikes allowed; GPX route and tracking device provided.
logistics.local_considerations: Dutch traffic laws mandatory; no drafting except teams; coastal winds, mild spring weather.

final_verdict.one_liner: Epic self-supported flat loop testing endurance against Dutch winds and distance.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Ultra bikepackers seeking unsupported road miles, solo/team riders comfortable self-organizing.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes for wind-hardened adventurers valuing raw challenge over support.
pro_tips: Pack light for self-support; source food en route.
Book early hostel; bring shower towel for finish.
